name: Textured Glass Soap Pump Mulberry - Threshold™
description:
Enhance your bathroom aesthetics with this Textured Glass Soap Pump from Threshold™. Made of glass, this soap pump features a gold-tone base and dispenser for elegant charm, while the bubble-like raised design adds a touch of sophistication. Compatible with lotions and liquid soaps, this 9.8-fluid-ounce soap pump in mulberry is a must-have addition to your bathroom.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
